			c0,0-3.673-2.134-6.677-0.603c-3.004,1.531-5.19,2.551-9.012,1.786c-3.82-0.766-10.141-1.786-13.625,1.193
			c-2.214,1.892-0.757,0.769-3.76,7.404c-2.793,6.168-2.906,12.761-1.815,15.824c1.091,3.062,7.424,4.947,10.375,4.67
			c2.952-0.278,1.178,0.257,7.732-3.059c2.185-0.51,5.024,3.245,7.052,3.059c2.027-0.186,4.614,0.205,5.333-1.045
			c0.721-1.249,2.632,0.281,4.542,0.027c1.912-0.254,6.552-3.828,4.095-16.333C147.629,6.776,146.103,6.098,145.842,6.358z"/>
		<path id="Контур17" onclick="Resize('17')" fill="#413003" d="M146.738,5.963c-0.434-0.109-0.824-0.281-1.164-0.503
			c-0.001,0.013-0.004,0.024-0.004,0.035c-1.511-0.202-3.044-0.799-4.63-0.799c-2.175,0-4.026,1.306-6.145,1.825
			c-2.755,0.677-6.474-0.267-8.792-0.456c-3.043-0.248-6.066,0.547-8.414,1.48c-0.35,0.14-0.544,0.11-0.669-0.027
			c-0.292,0.206-0.617,0.375-0.981,0.499c-0.184,0.57-0.506,1.233-0.713,1.808c-0.897,2.496-1.929,4.925-2.838,7.184
			c-1.34,3.341-2.8,6.838-2.551,10.946c0.272,4.496,2.671,6.438,6.05,7.642c2.274,0.81,4.343,2.045,6.709,1.824
			c3.185-0.299,4.913-3.171,7.752-2.964c1.823,0.132,2.97,1.947,4.82,2.51c0.827,0.251,2.084,0.44,3.311,0.227
			c0.963-0.167,2.12-1.277,3.499-1.48c1.666-0.248,3.952,0.626,5.67-0.114c1.877-0.809,2.774-3.738,3.215-6.385
			c1.054-6.351-0.004-12.523-1.608-16.993C148.472,10.033,147.244,8.096,146.738,5.963z M150.202,28.531

			c-2.16-0.288-3.613-2.458-5.672-2.624c-3.017-0.241-4.497,2.25-7.373,2.737c-0.583,0.099-1.823,0.171-2.743,0
			c-1.866-0.348-4.318-1.219-6.145-2.28c-3.059-1.777-4.14-4.529-3.308-10.035c0.633-4.19,2.159-7.246,3.593-10.492
			c0.657-1.489,1.3-3.867,2.268-4.561c0.871-0.624,2.226-0.725,3.404-1.025c1.225-0.317,2.506-0.625,3.686-0.686
			c2.555-0.13,5.179,0.792,7.94,0.686c3.552-0.139,7.429-2.387,11.25-1.826c0.711,0.104,1.89,0.316,2.456,0.799
			c0.64,0.542,1.08,2.088,1.513,2.965C149.72,14.96,151.343,21.102,150.202,28.531z"/>
		
			<text id="Номер17" onclick="Resize('17')" onmouseover="SF('17')" onmouseout="SF2('17')" transform="matrix(1 0 0 1 123.9131 25.0024)" fill="#413003" enable-background="new    " font-family="'MyriadPro-Bold'" font-size="11.9814">17</text>
	</g>
	<g id="Зуб18">
		<path id="Цвет18" onclick="Resize('18')" onmouseover="SF('18')" onmouseout="SF2('18')" fill="#FFFFFF" d="M102.925,5.979
			c0,0-3.459-2.133-6.285-0.603c-2.828,1.53-4.885,2.552-8.482,1.787C84.56,6.396,78.61,5.375,75.333,8.355
			c-2.083,1.892-0.712,0.769-3.539,7.404c-2.626,6.168-2.735,12.759-1.708,15.824c1.027,3.062,6.987,4.946,9.764,4.668
			c2.778-0.278,1.111,0.259,7.279-3.059c2.057-0.508,4.729,3.246,6.638,3.059c1.909-0.184,4.344,0.205,5.021-1.045
			c0.677-1.247,2.477,0.283,4.276,0.029c1.797-0.254,6.166-3.828,3.853-16.332C104.607,6.397,103.168,5.72,102.925,5.979z"/>
		<path id="Контур18" onclick="Resize('18')" fill="#413003" d="M106.079,12.225c-0.717-2.138-1.834-4.03-2.328-6.101
			c-0.479-0.146-0.897-0.368-1.252-0.652c-1.377-0.215-2.777-0.776-4.221-0.776c-2.038,0-3.774,1.307-5.763,1.825
			c-2.586,0.676-6.076-0.267-8.248-0.456c-2.855-0.249-5.69,0.548-7.894,1.479c-0.397,0.169-0.58,0.09-0.687-0.132
			C75.44,7.567,75.169,7.699,74.874,7.8c-0.148,0.614-0.494,1.373-0.716,2.03c-0.842,2.496-1.811,4.926-2.662,7.184
			c-1.257,3.341-2.625,6.837-2.393,10.946c0.255,4.496,2.507,6.437,5.676,7.642c2.137,0.81,4.079,2.045,6.295,1.824

			c0.902-0.168,1.987-1.277,3.28-1.481c1.564-0.247,3.706,0.625,5.32-0.114c1.763-0.808,2.603-3.736,3.016-6.386
			C108.577,22.866,107.584,16.693,106.079,12.225z M106.966,28.531c-0.376,2.636-1.334,5.281-2.835,6.158
			c-1.186,0.695-2.951-0.06-4.435,0c-2.33,0.094-3.577,1.796-5.764,1.482c-2.024-0.29-3.388-2.458-5.32-2.624
			c-2.832-0.241-4.22,2.25-6.916,2.737c-0.549,0.099-1.709,0.171-2.572,0c-1.75-0.348-4.05-1.219-5.763-2.28
			c-2.871-1.777-3.886-4.529-3.105-10.035c0.594-4.19,2.024-7.246,3.369-10.492c0.618-1.489,1.22-3.869,2.127-4.561
			c0.817-0.624,2.089-0.723,3.192-1.024c1.151-0.316,2.351-0.624,3.46-0.686c2.398-0.13,4.858,0.792,7.449,0.686
			c3.331-0.139,6.97-2.387,10.552-1.826c0.668,0.104,1.773,0.314,2.305,0.8c0.6,0.542,1.012,2.087,1.419,2.965
			C106.513,14.959,108.038,21.102,106.966,28.531z"/>
		
			<text id="Номер18" onclick="Resize('18')" onmouseover="SF('18')" onmouseout="SF2('18')" transform="matrix(1 0 0 1 81.6934 24.7202)" fill="#413003" enable-background="new    " font-family="'MyriadPro-Bold'" font-size="11.9814">18</text>
	</g>
	<g id="Del" display="none">
		
			<circle id="crossSelect" onclick="ClickCross()" onmouseover="SelectCross()" onmouseout="SelectCross()" display="inline" fill="#EA7E73" stroke="#000000" stroke-miterlimit="10" cx="643.484" cy="61.143" r="12.187"/>
		
			<line id="cross" onclick="ClickCross()" onmouseover="SelectCross()" onmouseout="SelectCross()" display="inline" fill="none" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="2" stroke-miterlimit="10" x1="638.704" y1="55.801" x2="648.399" y2="66.306"/>
		
			<line id="cross2" onclick="ClickCross()" onmouseover="SelectCross()" onmouseout="SelectCross()" display="inline" fill="none" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="2" stroke-miterlimit="10" x1="648.399" y1="55.801" x2="638.704" y2="66.306"/>
	</g>
	<g id="МножественныйВыборВзрослая">
		
			<ellipse id="MultiSelect" display="none" fill="#8EAFE8" stroke="#000000" stroke-miterlimit="10" cx="657.003" cy="20.55" rx="15.027" ry="12.121"/>
		<g id="МножественныйРежимВыделения">
			
				<path id="teeth2" onclick="SelectClick()" onmouseover="Select()" onmouseout="Select()" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.75" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="
				M656.98,13.38c0,0,5.521-1.458,8.233-0.044c2.711,1.414,5.117,13.931-4.634,15.271c-0.796-0.322-1.687-1.756-1.687-1.756
				S649.83,26.732,656.98,13.38z"/>
			<path fill="#F5FAF4" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.75" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M665.839,13.604
				c-0.162-0.054-0.307-0.123-0.435-0.205c-0.564-0.338-1.591-0.268-2.495-0.367c-0.594-0.064-1.195-0.202-1.754-0.215
				c-1.359-0.034-2.75,0.465-3.942,0.648c-0.012-0.003-0.015-0.008-0.02-0.013c-0.095,0.05-0.204,0.092-0.316,0.126
				c-0.151,0.326-0.316,0.651-0.464,0.97c-0.308,0.67-0.65,1.335-0.962,1.985c-0.613,1.285-1.513,2.684-1.399,4.489
				c0.323,5.153,2.249,5.372,4.3,6.027c0.503,0.161,0.961,0.71,1.218,0.994c0.236,0.263,0.285,1.062,1.269,1.095
				c0.723,0.024,6.56-2.44,6.963-6.561c0.301-3.098-0.168-6.464-1.401-8.373C666.218,13.925,665.997,13.849,665.839,13.604z
				 M667.548,21.622c-0.322,5.093-6.081,6.958-6.731,7.07c-0.651,0.111-1.687-1.757-1.687-1.757
				c-0.314-0.376-1.902-0.384-2.662-0.938c-0.95-0.691-1.291-1.261-1.88-2.907c-0.159-0.448-0.228-2.041-0.171-2.808
				c0.115-1.671,1.087-3.388,1.841-4.79c0.376-0.699,0.55-1.308,1.052-1.683c2.222-0.784,5.769-0.733,8.1-0.043
				C666.919,15.614,667.754,18.381,667.548,21.622z"/>
		</g>
		<g id="МножественныйРежимВыделения">
			<path fill="none" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.75" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M658.013,13.491
				c-0.161-0.055-0.308-0.123-0.435-0.205c-0.567-0.338-1.592-0.268-2.498-0.366c-0.591-0.064-1.196-0.202-1.754-0.216
				c-1.357-0.034-2.748,0.466-3.942,0.648c-0.009-0.003-0.012-0.009-0.019-0.013c-0.098,0.05-0.204,0.092-0.316,0.127
				c-0.152,0.325-0.314,0.65-0.461,0.969c-0.309,0.671-0.653,1.334-0.963,1.985c-0.613,1.286-1.514,2.685-1.401,4.49
				c0.325,5.152,2.252,5.372,4.3,6.025c0.503,0.163,0.961,0.711,1.218,0.994c0.236,0.264,0.284,1.063,1.268,1.096
				c0.724,0.024,6.562-2.44,6.964-6.561c0.301-3.098-0.169-6.464-1.402-8.374C658.396,13.812,658.172,13.737,658.013,13.491z
				 M659.722,21.509c-0.325,5.092-6.081,6.958-6.732,7.07c-0.651,0.111-1.687-1.757-1.687-1.757
				c-0.314-0.375-1.901-0.384-2.664-0.939c-0.949-0.689-1.288-1.26-1.88-2.906c-0.159-0.448-0.227-2.041-0.174-2.808
				c0.115-1.671,1.088-3.387,1.843-4.791c0.376-0.698,0.548-1.307,1.052-1.682c2.222-0.784,5.769-0.733,8.099-0.043
				C659.092,15.5,659.929,18.269,659.722,21.509z"/>
			
				<path id="teeth" onclick="SelectClick()" onmouseover="Select()" onmouseout="Select()" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.75" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="
				M649.154,13.268c0,0,5.521-1.457,8.232-0.044c2.713,1.413,5.118,13.931-4.632,15.271c-0.794-0.323-1.686-1.757-1.686-1.757
				S642.004,26.62,649.154,13.268z"/>
		</g>
	</g>
	<g id="ОдиночныйВыборВзрослая">
		
			<ellipse id="SingleSelect" fill="#8EAFE8" stroke="#000000" stroke-miterlimit="10" cx="628.727" cy="20.688" rx="11.84" ry="12.174"/>
		<g id="ОдиночныйРежимВыделения">
			
				<path id="tooth" onclick="SelectClick()" onmouseover="Select()" onmouseout="Select()" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.75" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="
				M625.043,12.826c0,0,5.155-1.536,7.691-0.046c2.536,1.488,4.783,14.681-4.329,16.091c-0.742-0.34-1.576-1.85-1.576-1.85
				S618.359,26.897,625.043,12.826z"/>
			<path fill="#413003" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.75" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M633.323,13.062
				c-0.151-0.057-0.287-0.13-0.409-0.217c-0.527-0.354-1.487-0.282-2.332-0.387c-0.554-0.068-1.118-0.211-1.64-0.226
				c-1.269-0.037-2.57,0.491-3.685,0.683c-0.008-0.004-0.012-0.01-0.019-0.014c-0.093,0.053-0.191,0.096-0.298,0.132
				c-0.142,0.344-0.293,0.686-0.429,1.022c-0.286,0.707-0.613,1.407-0.9,2.092c-0.574,1.354-1.417,2.828-1.312,4.731
				c0.306,5.428,2.103,5.661,4.021,6.349c0.467,0.17,0.898,0.75,1.136,1.049c0.221,0.277,0.271,1.119,1.186,1.154
				c0.677,0.024,6.131-2.572,6.508-6.913c0.281-3.264-0.157-6.812-1.311-8.824C633.677,13.401,633.472,13.321,633.323,13.062z
				 M634.919,21.51c-0.303,5.367-5.683,7.333-6.292,7.45c-0.612,0.118-1.576-1.851-1.576-1.851c-0.294-0.395-1.776-0.404-2.49-0.989
				c-0.889-0.728-1.209-1.327-1.761-3.063c-0.148-0.472-0.208-2.151-0.162-2.958c0.107-1.762,1.017-3.569,1.721-5.047
				c0.354-0.737,0.515-1.378,0.985-1.773c2.074-0.826,5.389-0.773,7.571-0.045C634.332,15.18,635.113,18.095,634.919,21.51z"/>
		</g>
	</g>
</g>
		
		<script type="text/javascript">
		var mId = "Layer_1";
		var selzub = "";
		var selectzub;
		var mas='';
		var SelZubMas = new Array(49);
		var Color = "rgb(235, 210, 150)";
		var SelectColorDel = "rgb(234, 126, 115)"; 
		var FlagSinglSelect = true;	
		var SelectedTeeth = [];
		var ViewSelect = true;
		document.oncontextmenu = function() {
		   return false; 
		}  	
	
		document.getElementById("cross").style.cursor  		 = "pointer";		
		document.getElementById("cross2").style.cursor 		 = "pointer";
		document.getElementById("teeth").style.cursor  		 = "pointer";
		document.getElementById("teeth2").style.cursor		 = "pointer";  
		document.getElementById("tooth").style.cursor  		 = "pointer";
		document.getElementById("crossSelect").style.cursor  = "pointer";

        function SelectSwich(){
           stroke = document.getElementById("SwitchCircle").getAttribute("stroke-width");
		   if(stroke == 1.3){ 		   		
		   		document.getElementById("SwitchCircle").setAttribute("stroke-width", 1.8);		   		
		   }
		   else{
		   		document.getElementById("SwitchCircle").setAttribute("stroke-width", 1.3);
		   	}
        } 
        
		function ClickCross(){
			z = SelectedTeeth.length;
			a = 0;      
			for (;;){       
			   if (a == z){break;}  			   
			   if (SelZubMas[SelectedTeeth[a].replace('Цвет','')] == null)
			   {
			   document.getElementById(SelectedTeeth[a]).style.fill = "#FFFFFF";
			   }
			   else
			   {
				  document.getElementById(SelectedTeeth[a]).style.fill = Color;  
			   }			   		   
			   a++;       			  	 
			}
			SelectedTeeth = [];	 
			document.getElementById("crossSelect").style.fill = "#fcfaeb"; 
		}
		
		function SelectCross(){
		   stroke = document.getElementById("cross").getAttribute("stroke-width");
		   if(stroke == 2){ 		   		
		   		document.getElementById("cross").setAttribute("stroke-width", 2.75);
		   		document.getElementById("cross2").setAttribute("stroke-width", 2.75);
		   }
		   else{
		   		document.getElementById("cross").setAttribute("stroke-width", 2);
		   		document.getElementById("cross2").setAttribute("stroke-width", 2);
		   }
		}
		
		function Select(){
		   id =  window.event.srcElement.id;		
		   stroke = window.event.srcElement.getAttribute("stroke-width");
		   if(stroke == 1.75){ 		   		
		         if ((id == "teeth")||(id == "teeth2")){
		         	document.getElementById("teeth").setAttribute("stroke-width", 0.75);
		         	document.getElementById("teeth2").setAttribute("stroke-width", 0.75);
		         }
		         else{
		   		 	window.event.srcElement.setAttribute("stroke-width", 0.75);   
		   		 }
		   }
		   else{
   		         if ((id == "teeth")||(id == "teeth2")){
		         	document.getElementById("teeth").setAttribute("stroke-width", 1.75);
		         	document.getElementById("teeth2").setAttribute("stroke-width", 1.75);
		         }
		         else{		   		
		   		 	window.event.srcElement.setAttribute("stroke-width", 1.75);  
		   		 }
		   }  		   	
		}  
		
		function SelectClick(){
			id =  window.event.srcElement.id;
			if ((id == "teeth")||(id == "teeth2")){
				document.getElementById("MultiSelect").setAttribute("display", "");	
				document.getElementById("SingleSelect").setAttribute("display", "none");
				document.getElementById("Del").setAttribute("display", "");
				FlagSinglSelect = false;
			}
			else{
				document.getElementById("MultiSelect").setAttribute("display", "none");
				document.getElementById("SingleSelect").setAttribute("display", "");
				document.getElementById("Del").setAttribute("display", "none");
				FlagSinglSelect = true;
				ClickCross();
			}                         		
		}
		   		
		function Resize(id)
		{
			xId = "Цвет"+id;  
			if(FlagSinglSelect)
			{  		
			if (selzub != xId )
			{
			  if (selzub != "")
			  { 
			    z = SelectedTeeth.length;
			 	a = 0;      
			 	for (;;){       
			     if (a == z){break;}
			     if (SelectedTeeth[a] == selzub){
			     SelectedTeeth.splice(a,1);			    
			     break}     
			   	 a++;       			  	 
				 }	              
				if (SelZubMas[selzub.substring(4)] == null)
				{               
				  document.getElementById(selzub).style.fill = "#FFFFFF";
				}
				else
				{
				  document.getElementById(selzub).style.fill = Color;
				}
			  }
			}
			}
			 if (document.getElementById("Цвет"+id).style.fill != "rgb(111, 152, 207)")
			{ 
			   document.getElementById("Цвет"+id).style.fill = "rgb(111, 152, 207)";       
			   selzub = "Цвет"+id; 			   
			   SelectedTeeth[SelectedTeeth.length] = selzub;			  	 
			   
			}
			else
			{   			  
			 	z = SelectedTeeth.length;
			 	a = 0;      
			 	for (;;){       
			     if (a == z){break;}
			     if (SelectedTeeth[a] == "Цвет"+id){
			     SelectedTeeth.splice(a,1);
			     break}     
			   	 a++;       			  	 
				 }		
			 
			   if (SelZubMas[id] == null)
			   {
			   document.getElementById("Цвет"+id).style.fill = "rgb(201, 226, 255)";
			   }
			   else
			   {
				  document.getElementById("Цвет"+id).style.fill = Color;
			   }
			   selzub = "";
			} 
			
				if(SelectedTeeth.length > 0){
					document.getElementById("crossSelect").style.fill = SelectColorDel; 
				}
				else{
				    document.getElementById("crossSelect").style.fill = "#fcfaeb";
				}
			   			   
		}
		function SF(id)
		{
		   document.getElementById("Цвет"+id).style.cursor = "pointer";
		   document.getElementById("Номер"+id).style.cursor = "pointer";
		   if (document.getElementById("Цвет"+id).style.fill.toString() != "rgb(111, 152, 207)")
		   {          
			 if ( document.getElementById("Цвет"+id).style.fill != Color){
			   document.getElementById("Цвет"+id).style.fill = "rgb(201, 226, 255)";
			   }
		   }
		}
		function SF2(id)
		{
		 if (document.getElementById("Цвет"+id).style.fill != "rgb(111, 152, 207)")
		   {
		   if (  document.getElementById("Цвет"+id).style.fill != Color){       
			  document.getElementById("Цвет"+id).style.fill = "#FFFFFF";
			  }
		   }
		}
		function start(){
			if (selectzub != null)
		   {
			if ( document.getElementById("Цвет"+selectzub).style.fill != "rgb(111, 152, 207)"){
			  Resize(selectzub);
			 }else{
			  selzub = "Цвет"+selectzub;}
		   }
		   if (mas != "")
		   {
			 arr = mas.split(',');     
			 i = "f";
			 z = arr.length;
			 a = 0;      
			 for (;;){       
			   SelZubMas[arr[a]] = Color;
				if (selectzub != arr[a])
			  {   if (arr[a] < 49){
				  document.getElementById("Цвет"+arr[a]).style.fill = Color;}	
			   }       
			   a++;       
			   if (a == z){ 
				  break;
			   }     
			 }			
		   }		   
	        document.getElementById("crossSelect").style.fill = "#fcfaeb";
			if (!FlagSinglSelect){
				document.getElementById("MultiSelect").setAttribute("display", "");	
				document.getElementById("SingleSelect").setAttribute("display", "none");
				document.getElementById("Del").setAttribute("display", "");								
			}
			else{
				document.getElementById("MultiSelect").setAttribute("display", "none");
				document.getElementById("SingleSelect").setAttribute("display", "");
				document.getElementById("Del").setAttribute("display", "none");
			}
			
 		    z = SelectedTeeth.length;
			a = 0;     
			for (;;){       
			   if (a == z){break;} 			  			  
			   document.getElementById(SelectedTeeth[a]).style.fill =  "rgb(111, 152, 207)";			  
			   document.getElementById("crossSelect").style.fill =  SelectColorDel;			   		   
			   a++;       			  	 
			}
           	if (!ViewSelect){
           		document.getElementById('МножественныйВыборВзрослая').setAttribute("display", "none");
           		document.getElementById('ОдиночныйВыборВзрослая').setAttribute("display", "none");
           	}   
			
		}
		try{  
		start();
		 }
	 	catch(err){}			
  
	</script>
</svg>
